query:
SELECT description, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items
WHERE description REGEXP 'BYOD|HWD|hardware|router|gateway|phone|handset|device|modem|Starting:|Ending:|Start Date|End Date|activation|installed'
GROUP BY description
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT description, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM billing_items
WHERE description REGEXP 'BYOD|HWD|hardware|router|gateway|phone|handset|device|modem|Starting:|Ending:|Start Date|End Date|activation|installed'
GROUP BY description
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;
